data.name: Hentai Link
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Link is a vibrant connect-the-dots match-3 game, where your mission is to drag or swipe to link blocks of the same color. Connect three or more blocks to clear them and earn points. The game’s challenge increases as you aim to form longer chains, creating powerful combos for higher scores. Each level introduces new twists, requiring quick reflexes and smart strategies to keep advancing. With colorful graphics and exciting sound effects, this game offers a fun, addictive experience that keeps you engaged. Whether you're looking for a casual break or a longer challenge, this game provides endless entertainment.

Feature list :

The game features a gentle, minimalist style.

Calming background music.

Fullscreen mode unlocks upon game completion.

Prepare yourself for captivating and enjoyable experiences. No need to worry about time limits just relax, have fun, and dive into the vibrant game world!

data.short_description: This is a lively match-3 connect-the-dots game where your objective is to drag or swipe to join blocks of the same color. Match three or more blocks to remove them and score points.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
